The '''''Tampion''''' was a [[fleet shuttle]] in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Combined Defense Forces of the New Republic]].

In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], it was sent to ferry [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the [[Endurance-class fleet carrier|''Endurance''-class fleet carrier]] [[Intrepid (Endurance-class)|''Intrepid'']], which was stationed at the periphery of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], so that Solo could take command of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|New Republic Fifth Battle Group]] and defend the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] from the danger of the [[Yevetha]].

However, in the [[Capture of the Tampion|capture of the ''Tampion'']], the ''Tampion'' and her escort of the eight [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-Xs]] of the Fifth Battle Group's [[Bravo Flight (New Republic)|Bravo Flight]] were interdicted 91 light-years from the Koornacht Cluster by the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor Star Dreadnaught]] [[Imperator (Immobilizer 418 cruiser)|''Imperator'']]. The ''Tampion'' and her escorts were hit by a thick barrage of [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannon]] fire, and the Yevetha used an [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustship]] to [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor]] in the disabled ''Tampion'', and boarded it.

The pilot of the ''Tampion'', [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Sreas]], was killed by a blaster bolt. Commodore Solo and the engineer of the fleet shuttle, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Barth]], surrendered without a fight, knowing the odds were hopeless. They were captured and sent to [[N'zoth]].
